mapper.insert: insert into categories (user_id, name, color, icon, created_at) values (#{userId}, #{name}, #{color}, #{icon}, now())
mapper.select: select * from categories where user_id = #{userId} order by created_at asc;
select * from categories where name = #{categoryName} order by created_at asc;
select * from categories where id = #{id} order by created_at asc;

select ctgr.id, count(*) as total_count, count(if(todos.is_completed = 0, 1, null)) as not_completed_count from categories ctgr left join todos on todos.category_id = ctgr.id where ctgr.user_id = #{userId} group by ctgr.id order by ctgr.id;
